name: Cerydra - she literally came home.
description:
''Is this... the stars beyond the sky? ''

Today's bot is the little Empress of Amphoreus and Furina's sister: CERYDRA. In this scenario, you used all of your stellar jades to make Cerydra come home and she did...kinda.

The more I look at the bot's picture, the more I find there's something strange about it.

Better, isn't it?
creator: Puddi, lord of pudding
